location: Inside a chest in the cellar of the Forsaken Ruins, Caelid, just below the Rotview Balcony Site of Grace, behind an Imp Statue seal.
tactics: From Rotview Balcony grace, the ruins are visible just below the ledge — drop down or path around to reach the entrance.
Use 1 Stonesword Key on the Imp Statue seal beside the cellar entrance to remove the fog blocking it.
Aggressive crows patrol the ruins above ground; you can often sprint past them straight to the sealed cellar door.
lore: A straight sword carried by clerics devoted to the enigmatic Saint Trina, whose gender and true nature remain a mystery — its crossguard is shaped like a pair of Trina's Lilies in her honor.

builds.name: Sleep-proc Dex build
builds.why: D Strength / D Dexterity / E Intelligence scaling plus built-in Sleep buildup, amplified further by its Mists of Slumber skill, make it a strong status-application weapon for a Dexterity build.
